Motion To Amend Court'S Order Dated Jan 11, 2007 To Move The Minor'S Money To A Higher Yielding Bank Account Or Cd

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion to Amend Court's Order dated Jan 11, 2007 hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Matt Kumin, Esq. for Petitioner: Zether McGriger, present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, Motion is Granted.
Order signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Howell.
John Burris, Esq. for Petitioner: Vilda Curry, present as Guardian at litem for: Amber Curry, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $18,750.00
A net balance of $56,250.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, Kearny St. Branch, 700 Market St., San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim of Minor
and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
